meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Overcome the no-portfolio barrier with our Antigravity project template. A high-impact guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch fast.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by shipping high-fidelity, functional AI applications. Use the Antigravity project template to bypass boilerplate and focus on core logic. By integrating Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, allowing you to deploy a production-ready feature in hours, not weeks. Start building your career today.
content.intro:
The screen glows with the cursor blinking in a void—the silent, agonizing reminder that you have skills but nothing to show for them. You are trapped in the 'no experience' loop, where every job application feels like shouting into a vacuum. You are not just missing a portfolio; you are missing the concrete evidence that you can translate complex ideas into working, scalable software.

Relief is here. We are moving past the era of generic 'To-Do' lists and static landing pages. With the Antigravity project template and the raw velocity of Claude Code, you will build a high-fidelity AI application that commands attention. This isn't just a coding exercise; it’s your bridge from student status to professional developer.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish the project architecture to ensure your codebase is enterprise-ready from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js project using the Antigravity template, including Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and pre-configured authentication modules.

steps.title: Define the AI Feature Logic
steps.description: Inject core AI functionality into your app using modular design patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an API route handler that integrates the Anthropic API to process user input and return structured JSON responses for a custom AI tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create a service layer for AI text processing in src/lib/ai.ts'

steps.title: Implement State Management
steps.description: Ensure your UI reacts instantly to AI streaming responses for a professional user experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a React hook that handles streaming AI text responses with loading states and error handling for the frontend.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit src/hooks/useAIStream.ts --task 'Add streaming state logic'

steps.title: Build the High-Conversion UI
steps.description: Style your components to look like a premium SaaS platform rather than a student project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a clean, modern dashboard interface using Tailwind CSS, featuring a sidebar, chat area, and responsive mobile design.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm run dev' && claude ui-fix

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Prepare your code for the world and verify everything is production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a full audit of the project, including dependency checks and performance optimization tips for Vercel deployment.

pro_tips: Always focus on the 'Time-to-First-Value'—your UI should show results within seconds, not minutes.
Use Claude Code to document your components as you build; documentation is the hallmark of a senior dev.
Integrate a 'Reset' feature for your AI state; it shows you care about user error handling.
Avoid over-engineering the backend; use serverless functions via your template to keep costs at zero.
Commit your code daily with descriptive messages; a clean GitHub commit history is often more impressive than the app itself.
content.next_steps: After completing your deployment, create a 30-second loom video walkthrough of your app, link it to your GitHub README, and share it on LinkedIn tagging the tools you used.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for permission to be a developer. Your portfolio is a reflection of the tools you use and the problems you solve. Take control of your career narrative today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
